cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 4.2.3)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH "/home/kyaru/Documents/OpenFlipper/OpenFlipper-Free/Package-GP/libs/eigen/cmake")
set(_CMAKE_CHECK_ENABLED_LANGUAGES "C;CXX")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER "/usr/bin/cc")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_C_COMPILER_VERSION "15.2.1")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER "/usr/bin/c++")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID "GNU")
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_LOADED 1)
set(CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_VERSION "15.2.1")

project(CheckFortran LANGUAGES Fortran)
file(WRITE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/result.cmake" "set(CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER \"${CMAKE_Fortran_COMPILER}\")
")
